lines.original: Bila masih mungkin kita menorehkan batin
lines.translation: If it is still possible, we will inscribe it inwardly

lines.original: Atas nama jiwa dan hati tulus ikhlas
lines.translation: In the name of a sincere soul and heart

lines.original: Mumpung masih ada kesempatan buat kita
lines.translation: While there is still a chance for us
Gather supplies for an eternal journey

lines.original: Kita pasti ingat tragedi yang memilukan
lines.translation: We certainly remember the heartbreaking tragedy

lines.original: Kenapa harus mereka yang terpilih menghadap
lines.translation: Why must those who are selected face it?

lines.original: Tentu ada hikmah yang harus kita petik
lines.translation: Of course there are lessons that we must learn

lines.original: Atas nama jiwa mari heningkan cipta
lines.translation: In the name of the soul, let's have a moment of silence

lines.original: Kita mesti bersyukur bahwa kita masih diberi waktu
lines.translation: We must be grateful that we are still given time

lines.original: Entah sampai kapan tak ada yang bakal dapat menghitung
lines.translation: Who knows how long no one will be able to count

lines.original: Hanya atas kasih-Nya, hanya atas kehendak-Nya
lines.translation: Only by His love, only by His will
We still meet the sun

lines.original: Kepada rumput ilalang, kepada bintang gemintang
lines.translation: To the weeds, to the stars
We can try to borrow His notes
How long can it be?
There's still time left
Everyone shook their heads, everyone fell silent
Everyone answered they didn't understand
The best thing is just to immediately prostrate
While we still have time
